summary: Frontend testing completed successfully. Both features verified: 1) Status badges in Key Information section no longer have tick/cross icons - only text labels (Good/Poor/No) are displayed. 2) Tyre Life modal shows Average Tyre Life percentage (45%) and 4 tyre cards (Front Right, Rear Right, Front Left, Rear Left) each with photo and individual tread life percentage from Q&A data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Key Information section StatusBadge component successfully modified to show text-only labels without icons. TyreModal component enhanced to display tyre photos and percentages from Q&A data.

test_cases.evidence: Successfully logged in and redirected to ad-analytics page
Page loaded successfully with vehicle data (CELERIO VXI, Maruti Suzuki, 2014)

test_cases.test: 3. Key Information section - Status badges WITHOUT tick/cross icons
test_cases.evidence: Found 6 status badges (Poor, Poor, Poor, Good, No, No) - all have 0 SVG icons. Engine=Poor, Interior=Poor, Exterior=Poor, Insurance=Good, Accident=No, Flood Damage=No - all displayed as text-only labels

test_cases.test: 4. Click on Tyre Life to open modal
test_cases.evidence: Tyre Life button clicked successfully, modal opened with title 'Tyre Condition Details'

test_cases.test: 5. Tyre modal shows Average Tyre Life percentage
6. Tyre modal shows 4 tyre cards with photos and percentages
test_cases.evidence: 4 tyre cards displayed: Front Right (70%, Condition: 60-80), Rear Right (30%, Condition: 20-40), Front Left (50%, Condition: 40-60), Rear Left (30%, Condition: 20-40). Each card has tyre photo from Q&A data.
